basic_details.job_title: Samagra Shiksha Gajapati Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Primary Education Officer, Accountant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Samagra Shiksha Gajapati Primary Education Officer, Accountant Notification 2026 has been released on 01 December 2025 on the official website gajapati.odisha.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Samagra Shiksha Gajapati Primary Education Officer, Accountant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Ed or equivalent, B.Ed (Hon), B.Com with Computer Application & Accountancy
qualification.details: Primary Education Officer (Contractual): B.Ed or equivalent with 40% marks in graduation. Primary Education Officer (Contractual) (Hon): B.Ed (Hon) or equivalent with 40% marks in graduation. Accountant (Contractual): B.Com with Computer Application & Accountancy.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Samagra Shiksha Gajapati Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.gajapati.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Samagra Shiksha Gajapati Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Samagra Shiksha Gajapati Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Samagra Shiksha Gajapati Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Samagra Shiksha Gajapati Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.gajapati.odisha.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Samagra Shiksha Gajapati Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Samagra Shiksha Gajapati recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Samagra Shiksha Gajapati recruitment is 10 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Primary Education Officer posts?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Primary Education Officer (Contractual) post and one vacancy for the Primary Education Officer (Contractual) (Hon) post, totaling two vacancies for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Accountant (Contractual) post, candidates must possess a B.Com degree with Computer Application & Accountancy as their educational background.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Samagra Shiksha Gajapati recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Primary Education Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Primary Education Officer post is Rs. 9034/- per month for trained candidates and Rs. 7034/- per month for untrained candidates, including EPF.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this Samagra Shiksha Gajapati recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies released by Samagra Shiksha Gajapati?
faq.answer: Samagra Shiksha Gajapati has released a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Primary Education Officer and Accountant.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for Samagra Shiksha Gajapati?
faq.answer: The official website for Samagra Shiksha Gajapati is https://www.gajapati.odisha.gov.in. You can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts includes Document Verification and the preparation of a Merit List based on the candidates' qualifications and other criteria.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for SC/ST or other categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for detailed information regarding age limits and any applicable age relaxations for SC/ST or other reserved categories.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Samagra Shiksha Gajapati recruitment is 10 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.
